Must Do

FlowRider Surf Simulator
Deck 15 · Book on embarkation day · Free
Ultimate Abyss Dry Slide
10-story slide · Tallest at sea · No booking
Rock Climbing Wall
Deck 15 · Multiple routes · Free with cruise
AquaTheater Shows
Outdoor acrobatic shows · Check Daily Planner
Ice Skating Rink
Yes, on a cruise ship! · Session times in Planner
Escape Room
Royal Promenade · Book on embarkation · Limited spots

Specialty Dining

Chops Grille
Best specialty restaurant · Book on embarkation
Izumi (Hibachi · Sushi)
Fun group experience · Hibachi for all 6
Jamie's Italian
Casual Italian · Great pasta

Connectivity

T-Mobile in Europe
Free 2G data, texts, email. Calls $0.25/min — use WhatsApp instead. International Day Pass ($5/day) for full LTE on port days.
At Sea — Critical
T-Mobile does NOT cover ships at sea. Airplane Mode the moment the ship leaves port. Maritime roaming runs $2.50–5.00/MB.
Ship Wi-Fi (VOOM)
Buy before the cruise for 20–30% off. The Royal Caribbean app works FREE on the ship's internal network for schedules and group messaging.
Before You Leave

Pre-Trip
Checklist

Completion
0 / 0
⛔ Critical Reminders
Sagrada Familia: be at meeting point by 2:15 PM — no refunds, no latecomers waited on.
Pisa: meet guide OUTSIDE terminal in green shirt by 9:15 AM.
MIA Parking: photograph parking level, pillar, and space BEFORE walking away.
